text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Spring Stakes. Expectations for
an exciting race are high, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With many racers trying to avoid competing with
Maruzensky, the event barely has enough runners
to start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still hoping to enjoy the race as much as she can,
Maruzensky heads for the track...
